stories.title: LaMelo Ball Traded to Minnesota Timberwolves

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Anthony Edwards finally has a running mate. LaMelo Ball is headed to Minnesota — Ball + Josh Green for Naz Reid + a 2033 unprotected 1st + swaps. LaMelo brings 20.1 PPG, 7.1 APG & a 5yr/$112M extension. The West just got scarier. 🐺 #Timberwolves #HoopHeroes

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Charlotte's LaMelo era is over. After 6 seasons, Ball heads to Minnesota in a blockbuster deal. Hornets land Naz Reid, a 2033 unprotected 1st + swaps. Rebuilding mode activated. #Hornets #HoopHeroes

article.headline: LaMelo Ball Traded to Timberwolves: Anthony Edwards Finally Has His Running Mate

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
LaMelo Ball Traded to Timberwolves

#### Image Concept 1 — Social Post (1080x1350)
- **Type:** Player graphic
- **Imagn search term:** "LaMelo Ball Timberwolves"
- **Canva overlay text:** "LAMELO TO MINNESOTA" (top banner) / "20.1 PPG · 7.1 APG · 5YR/$112M" (stat bar bottom)
- **Color scheme:** Timberwolves midnight blue and Kelly green, with white typography
- **Mood:** Hype/announcement — bold, high-energy graphic with clean split-panel or full bleed action shot

#### Image Concept 2 — Article Hero (1200x630)
- **Type:** Player action shot — LaMelo driving or distributing
- **Imagn search term:** "LaMelo Ball Timberwolves"
- **Alt text:** "LaMelo Ball in a Minnesota Timberwolves uniform, handling the ball on the court"

stories.title: NBA Free Agency Preview — 4 Days Until June 30

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text: 4 days until NBA free agency. KAT eligible for a $272M extension. Harden & Trae Young hit the open market. LeBron's future unresolved. Dolan's second apron wall looming over New York. Chaos is coming. #HoopHeroes

article.headline: Four Days Until Free Agency: KAT's Extension, LeBron's Decision, and the Stars Still Available

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
NBA Free Agency Preview — June 30

#### Image Concept 1 — Social Post (1080x1350)
- **Type:** Multi-player collage graphic
- **Imagn search term:** "Karl-Anthony Towns Knicks" (primary image); secondary pulls: "James Harden" / "Trae Young"
- **Canva overlay text:** "FREE AGENCY STARTS JUNE 30" (header) / "KAT · HARDEN · TRAE · LEBRON" (nameplate bar)
- **Color scheme:** Dark charcoal background with gold and red accents — neutral palette to accommodate multiple teams
- **Mood:** Anticipation/urgency — countdown clock aesthetic, bold white type on dark background

#### Image Concept 2 — Article Hero (1200x630)
- **Type:** Wide court scene or press conference shot
- **Imagn search term:** "Karl-Anthony Towns Knicks"
- **Alt text:** "Karl-Anthony Towns in a New York Knicks uniform, a key player in the 2026 NBA free agency period"

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: The clock is ticking. July 6 — the trade window opens and Giannis officially becomes a Miami Heat. Giannis + Bam Adebayo in the same frontcourt. South Beach is about to become must-watch basketball. #HeatNation #HoopHeroes

article.headline: Ten Days to July 6: What Giannis Joining the Heat Actually Means for the East

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Giannis to Heat — July 6 Countdown

- **Imagn search term:** "Giannis Antetokounmpo Heat"
- **Canva overlay text:** "GIANNIS IS COMING" (bold header) / "JULY 6 · MIAMI HEAT" (subtext countdown bar)
- **Color scheme:** Miami Heat black, red, and gold — high contrast with white text
- **Mood:** Anticipation and power — dramatic lighting, Giannis in Heat uniform if available, otherwise trade announcement graphic style

#### Image Concept 2 — Article Hero (1200x630)

- **Alt text:** "Giannis Antetokounmpo in a Miami Heat uniform, driving to the basket"

stories.title: Knicks Dynasty Math — KAT's Turn to Sacrifice

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Brunson left $113M on the table. OG is locked at $212.5M. Now KAT says he's "ready to make a financial sacrifice" to keep the Knicks dynasty alive. Dolan called the second apron "suicidal." New York's math is different. #Knicks #HoopHeroes

article.headline: KAT's Turn: How the Knicks' Dynasty Hinges on One Financial Decision

image_concepts.label: Image

- **Canva overlay text:** "READY TO SACRIFICE" (large bold header) / "KAT · BRUNSON · OG — THE DYNASTY CONTINUES" (footer bar)
- **Color scheme:** Knicks blue and orange — traditional, championship-era palette
- **Mood:** Determined and resolute — serious tone, player staring into camera or mid-celebration with teammates if available

stories.title: 2026 NBA Summer League Preview — Rookie Class Takes Vegas

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Summer League tips off July 3 in Las Vegas. Dybantsa (No. 1 Wizards), Peterson (No. 2 Jazz), Boozer (No. 3 Grizzlies) headline a class with 8 freshmen in the top 9 picks. The future of the NBA is about to introduce itself. #HoopHeroes

article.headline: Summer League 2026: Five Rookies Who Will Define This Draft Class in Las Vegas
